answer:
<think> The Pabst Brewing Company has a long history, with its origins dating back to 1844 when it was founded by Jacob Best. By 1889, the company was named after Frederick Pabst. The company currently contracts for the brewing of various brands, including those from defunct breweries. One such defunct brewery is located in the northwest United States, near Olympia. This description matches the location and history of the Napa Brewing Company, which was located in Tumwater, Washington. </think>

<answer> Napa Brewing Company (in Tumwater, Washington)
